conservative.name: "Reverse" Engineering
conservative.requirements: Tools at hand, engaged with target. You must perform the prepare manoeuvre before performing the action

success.description: You expose shoddy workmanship for what it is with a few well-placed knocks from a spanner. The target item gains the Damaged condition

boon.description: Your joy in finding flaws in the work of others knows no bounds. Recover 1 stress

sigmarsComet.description: You manage to filch an important part. The item can't be repaired until the part is recovered or a new one acquired

reckless.name: "Reverse" Engineering
reckless.requirements: Tools at hand, engaged with target. You must perform the prepare manoeuvre before performing the action

success.description: You expose shoddy workmanship for what it is with a few well-placed knocks from a spanner. The target item gains the Damaged condition

boon.description: The device's owner or creator, if present, suffers 1 stress as you smash something dear to his heart

sigmarsComet.description: You manage to filch an important part. The item can't be repaired until the part is recovered or a new one acquired
